name: vocode
description: Voice-driven coding assistant for VS Code

vocode.voiceVadDebug.description: Print detailed voice-activity (speech detection) logs from the voice helper process. Use when tuning the mic or reporting an issue.

vocode.voiceSidecarLogProtocol.description: Log every message between VS Code and the voice helper in Developer Tools. Very noisy; leave off unless you are debugging the voice protocol.

vocode.elevenLabsSttLanguage.description: Language you speak for transcription (e.g. en, es). Use "auto" to let the service pick the language.

vocode.elevenLabsSttModelId.description: Which ElevenLabs speech-to-text model to use. The default is the recommended realtime model; change only if you know a specific model id.

vocode.voiceSttCommitResponseTimeoutMs.description: After you finish a phrase, how long to wait for the final transcript before continuing (milliseconds, up to 180 s). 0 = wait as long as needed. Long pauses without speech do not end the session; that limit is separate (about 3 minutes).

vocode.voiceVadThresholdMultiplier.description: How loud speech must be compared to background noise before it counts as talking. Higher = stricter (good for noisy rooms); lower = more sensitive.

vocode.voiceVadMinEnergyFloor.description: Quietest level that still counts as possible speech. Raise if the mic picks up hum or fan noise; lower if your voice is very soft.

vocode.voiceVadStartMs.description: How long you must speak before Vocode treats it as the start of a phrase (milliseconds). Higher reduces false starts.

vocode.voiceVadEndMs.description: How long you must pause before a phrase is treated as finished (milliseconds). Higher waits for longer pauses between sentences.

vocode.voiceVadPrerollMs.description: How much audio before detected speech is kept (milliseconds). Helps avoid clipping the first syllable.

vocode.voiceStreamMinChunkMs.description: Smallest slice of audio sent for recognition at once (milliseconds). Affects how quickly partial results can update.

vocode.voiceStreamMaxChunkMs.description: Largest slice of audio before it must be sent (milliseconds).

vocode.voiceStreamMaxUtteranceMs.description: During one long stretch of talking, finalize text at least this often (milliseconds). 0 = only finalize on pause or when you stop voice.

vocode.daemonAgentProvider.description: Which cloud model runs voice command routing and edits: OpenAI or Anthropic. Requires the matching API key in the Vocode panel (Settings → API keys) and an ElevenLabs key for speech-to-text.

vocode.daemonVoiceLogTranscript.description: When non-zero, write a short summary line to the backend log for each voice command (useful for debugging). 0 = off.

vocode.daemonOpenaiModel.description: OpenAI model used when the agent provider is OpenAI.

vocode.daemonOpenaiBaseUrl.description: Custom OpenAI-compatible API URL (no trailing slash), if you use a proxy or another host. Leave empty for OpenAI’s default servers.

vocode.daemonAnthropicModel.description: Anthropic model used when the agent provider is Anthropic.

vocode.daemonAnthropicBaseUrl.description: Custom Anthropic API URL (no trailing slash). Leave empty for Anthropic’s default servers.

vocode.daemonVoiceTranscriptQueueSize.description: How many spoken commands can wait in line to run at once.

vocode.daemonVoiceTranscriptCoalesceMs.description: Speech that arrives within this window (milliseconds) may be combined into one command.

vocode.daemonVoiceTranscriptMaxMergeJobs.description: Maximum number of separate spoken lines merged into one batch when combining commands.

vocode.daemonVoiceTranscriptMaxMergeChar.description: Maximum total characters when merging spoken lines into one batch.

vocode.sessionIdleResetMs.description: If you go this long without a voice command, Vocode forgets in-progress conversation context (follow-ups, file-picker steps, etc.). Default 30 minutes. Does not affect the microphone. 0 = never clear from idle time alone.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @vocode/protocol build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @vocode/core build && pnpm build && pnpm vscode:stage-assets
